issues.description: First effect has wrong trigger. The Rush keyword is granted as a static ability when the Leader has Sky Island type, not OnPlay. It should use 'Activated' trigger with LeaderHasType condition.
First effect condition uses HasCardOnBoard checking for name 'Sky Island', but should use LeaderHasType checking for type 'Sky Island'.

Second effect is missing the AddLife action. The text says 'If you have 1 or less Life cards, add up to 1 card from the top of your deck to the top of your Life cards', but this action is completely absent from the DSL.
Second effect's TrashFromHand should be optional according to 'You may trash 1 card from your hand', but the DSL doesn't specify optional: true.
Second effect's AddLife action should have a condition checking for 1 or less Life cards before executing.
